h5076a9acg3103g4597gb582g2763e6b5648e: Might be we'll see you in Baldur's Gate. Tieflings offered us coin to guard 'em on the road.
h62682314g2a38g4cf9ga7f2g519423e68a53: Not as much as I'd like, mind, but I'm done chasing baubles for shitey wizards.
hf364689dgc907g4a71g86a6gd48e9021ac5c: You made it - good. Reckon I've seen enough brave idiots run to their deaths for a while.
h314c83e3gaaf4g4878gb0eeg4b42b90ca934: Don't you have a heroic defence to lead?
h9ffef0c0g26e7g4d62g825bgcf0aece91b5b: You. Liam said you sprung him from the goblin camp.
h0c5628f8g7ae0g4416g8445gf831e4ba70ee: And now you're back to stand with this lot. A right soft heart you've got, don't you?
ha8dd64c8g35bcg4fffg88fbgd4070e776d21: I could say the same for you.
hd61f8d15gb5a1g4587gabcag090783111543: Soft head, more like. If I were smart, I'd be back in Baldur's Gate with my feet up.
hc288e9a8g8c49g4623gbb20gf0cfb0df0540: But this crowd patched Liam up when they had plenty reason not to. Might be I misjudged 'em.
h2bdab0e6g9590g45d1g8fd0ge80d298bfdb5: Still a lost cause, mind - but if you can't live smart, you may as well die right.
h49f032c9gfa61g41fcg8376gc3285adf14ba: Better a soft heart than none at all.
h1a4f9840gf557g4d8cga116g2cecd1cc609f: Oh, bugger off. I'm here, aren't I?
h3d228bb7g5ef9g427egbf8fg9db0c99213ca: I left Baldur's Gate to make some coin, not fall in with a bunch of homeless hellspawn.
hdbe50c87g0dd6g415cg9806gdcea0a91c62d: Can't see to Liam's wounds myself so I best keep this crowd alive to do it for me.
h47294860g0fdcg4b3fga77cg05ba17843f90: Soft heart, strong arm. How's Liam?
h97991ca5g03c2g4a44g8e92gcf5e55554841: Better than he was when you found him. Bugger gets to rest while we do the work.
h3770d596gd299g4accg9af8g36f8945e8c87: Still. This crowd looked after him, no questions asked. Reckon it's only fair I return the favour.
h6d2c5e5agfffeg44b8gaf0cg211487eedbb7: Seems you're not the only one that likes a lost cause.
hf5996607gac5bg4cb2gb88agcaf0b642c1d7: Soft heart, sharp mind. How's Liam?
hb156e781ge83cg4496g9acdg67d91551582b: Surprised to see you here protecting 'foulbloods'.
h13ab029egc574g4605g9b28ge9894888f3b0: Look... might be I've said some stupid things. No 'might' about it, actually.
h76a02620gcff5g429eg9e5ag431b85692f7a: But Liam said it was you sprung him from that goblin camp. Not me, not Aradin or Barth - you.
hc7dd5343g930dg4fa3g9042g22fab8fda478: I might be thick, but I'm fair - you save one of mine, I can at least try to return the favour.
